allow: Bash(for sym in ETHUSDT SOLUSDT XRPUSDT DOGEUSDT BNBUSDT)

Bash(for var in previousValues audioContext soundEnabled autoFillDebounceTimer botModalCurrentTab botModalRefreshInterval botDetailRefreshInterval allPnlCurrentPage allPnlTotalPages currentStatsPeriod)
Bash(./venv/bin/python -m py_compile app.py runner.py services/*.py config/*.py 2>&1 | head -20)

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('templates/dashboard.html'\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)
style_start = text.find\('<style>'\)
style_end = text.find\('</style>'\)
css = text[style_start:style_end]
opens = css.count\('{'\)
closes = css.count\('}'\)
print\(f'Open: {opens}, Close: {closes}, Balanced: {opens == closes}'\)
" && node -c /var/www/static/js/app_lf.js 2>&1 && echo "All syntax OK")

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('templates/dashboard.html'\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)
style_start = text.find\('<style>'\)
style_end = text.find\('</style>'\)
css = text[style_start:style_end]
opens = css.count\('{'\)
closes = css.count\('}'\)
print\(f'Open: {opens}, Close: {closes}, Balanced: {opens == closes}'\)
" && node -c /var/www/static/js/app_lf.js 2>&1 && echo "Syntax OK")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('static/js/app_lf.js','utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('JS syntax error:', e.message\); }" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('static/js/app_lf.js','utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('JS OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); }" 2>&1)
Bash(./venv/bin/python -m py_compile services/pnl_service.py && echo "pnl_service.py OK" && ./venv/bin/python -m py_compile app.py && echo "app.py OK")
Bash(head -100 /var/www/storage/trade_logs.json | jq '.[0:2]' 2>/dev/null || echo "File not readable or empty")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=open\('/var/www/storage/trade_logs.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); print\(f'Total entries: {len\(data\)}'\); print\('Sample symbols:', set\([d.get\('symbol', 'UNKNOWN'\) for d in data[:20]]\)\); tao_entries = [d for d in data if 'TAO' in \(d.get\('symbol'\) or ''\).upper\(\)]; print\(f'TAO entries: {len\(tao_entries\)}'\); print\('Sample TAO:', tao_entries[:2] if tao_entries else 'None'\)" 2>&1 || echo "Error reading file")
Bash(./venv/bin/python -m py_compile /var/www/templates/dashboard.html 2>&1 || echo "Not a Python file, expected")
